name: SW Omlette
recipeInstructions:
1. Scramble 3 eggs in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch omlette pan.
3. Cook on high heat, continually stirring until the bottom starts to set.
4. Remove from heat and place under the broiler until the eggs are no longer runny.
5. Add Napolitos, salsa, and cheese.
6. Return to the broiler until the cheese is melted.
7. Fold in half and serve.
